title: Raccoon Removal in Woodmere, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Woodmere, Long Island. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call for fast service!
intro: Raccoons are a growing problem in Woodmere, NY, where these intelligent animals often invade attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in search of shelter and food. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Woodmere and surrounding Long Island communities, using humane trapping and exclusion methods to protect your home. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of raccoon infestations in residential neighborhoods and deliver safe, effective solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Woodmere homeowners for years with licensed, insured professionals who prioritize humane wildlife removal and long-term prevention. We offer thorough inspections, same-day emergency service, and complete attic restoration to ensure raccoons never return to your property.
localContext: Woodmere's tree-lined streets and proximity to the Five Towns area create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in residential attics and garages. From homes near Woodmere Country Club to properties along Peninsula Boulevard, our team understands the specific wildlife challenges facing Long Island homeowners and responds quickly to protect your family and property.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Woodmere?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Woodmere typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of raccoons, access difficulty, and whether damage repair or attic restoration is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to my Woodmere home?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can cause significant damage by tearing insulation, chewing wires, damaging roof vents, and contaminating attics with urine and feces that may carry parasites and diseases like raccoon roundworm. They can also become aggressive if cornered, especially mothers protecting their young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Woodmere and Long Island. Once traps are set, most raccoons are captured within 3-7 days. After removal, we seal all entry points and can provide sanitation and repair services to restore your home.

faqs.question: What is your raccoon removal process?
faqs.answer: Our process includes a thorough property inspection to locate entry points and assess damage, humane trapping and removal of all raccoons, complete exclusion work to seal access points, attic cleanup and decontamination if needed, and a warranty to ensure raccoons don't return. All methods comply with New York wildlife regulations.
